title: Survival Discovered for minecraft
description:
This modpack is designed for all players who enjoy Survival Redstone Circuit.
一个面向所有热爱生电的玩家的整合包
body: Thank you so much for using my modpack,this modpack is designed for all players who enjoy Survival Redstone Circuit,its feature is to preserve more vanilla characteristics while significantly optimizing in - game performance，it offers a better UI, optimized gameplay, and more fun features and practical aids while significantly optimizing in - game performance and preserving more vanilla characteristics.
